summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TurfBook MVP - turf booking application. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with CORS authentication issues identified.

integration_issues.issue: CORS policy blocking authentication requests when credentials mode is 'include'
integration_issues.details: Backend CORS configuration needs to explicitly allow the frontend origin instead of wildcard when using credentials

passed_tests: Backend API: All 16 API endpoints working (GET /api/turfs, GET /api/turfs/{id}, GET /api/turfs/{id}/slots, POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, POST /api/bookings, GET /api/bookings/my, PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/cancel)
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero section and featured turfs
Frontend: Navigation links work (Home, Turfs, Login, Register)
Frontend: Turfs listing page loads all 6 turfs
Frontend: Sport and City filter dropdowns work correctly
Frontend: Turf detail page shows turf info, amenities, and Book Now button
Frontend: Login and Register pages load with forms
Frontend: Dark theme UI properly applied

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (8/10 major features working, auth blocked by CORS)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix CORS configuration in backend to properly allow frontend origin with credentials. The current setup blocks authentication requests due to wildcard '*' origin not being allowed with credentials mode 'include'. Update CORS middleware to use explicit frontend URL.
